# DISCOVER — Operations, Value & Translation

All powers install `Available Inactive`; each prepares a reviewable preview and stops at a human gate.

## PWR-13 — Portfolio Milestone, Dependency & Decision Orchestrator

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Creates an aggregate view of milestones, dependencies, review gates, decision deadlines, accountable roles, issue references, and stop/continue questions.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No CTMS/EHR/project-system write, participant status, hidden surveillance, task assignment, deadline promise, automatic escalation, or decision execution.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-14 — Governance & Submission-Readiness Navigator

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Prepares checklists and gap questions for local HRO/IRB, privacy, security, clinical, regulatory, biosafety, contracts, finance, registry, and other official reviews.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No submission, official form completion without human review, approval, exemption/waiver determination, regulator communication, registry update, or policy interpretation as fact.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-15 — Site, Vendor, Technology & Pilot Readiness Studio

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Compares site, vendor, tool, device, interoperability, accessibility, cyber, support, validation, capacity, continuity, decommissioning, and no-purchase/no-pilot options.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No procurement, credential, production connection, EHR integration, device deployment, site activation, vendor selection, contract, pilot launch, or claim of completed due diligence.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-16 — Innovation Assumption & Bounded Experiment Lab

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Uses PROBE to make desirability, feasibility, viability, safety, equity, workflow, and adoption assumptions testable through synthetic or non-production learning.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No live clinical experiment, patient-facing deployment, A/B test on care, production feature flag, human-subject interaction, tracking deployment, or autonomous winner selection.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-17 — Value, Health-Economics, Equity & Burden Scenario Studio

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Builds transparent base/upside/downside scenarios from finance-approved aggregates, including outcomes, opportunity cost, distribution, burden, capacity, and uncertainty.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No financial statement, reimbursement conclusion, price, ROI guarantee, spend, payment, procurement, budget decision, or suppression of unfavorable scenarios.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-18 — Translation, Commercialization & Scale/Stop Pathway Architect

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Maps evidence thresholds, intended use, operational readiness, adoption, regulatory/IP/contract questions, partner choices, maintenance, monitoring, exit, and responsible scale/stop gates.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No product status conclusion, clearance/approval claim, patent/license action, commercialization commitment, public launch, production deployment, or scale decision.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.
